narrative:
Pleasant (precinct in Hardin County) has 1,020 registered voters, with 42.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 48.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 40.5 percentage points.
